prompt: Edit this photograph. Keep the woman and her navy-and-white fine pinstripe sleeveless tiered maxi dress EXACTLY as they are: do not change, redraw, restyle or recolor the dress, its stripes, gathered neckline, ruched waist, tiers or hem, or her body, pose, hands, hair, face or black sandals. Preserve every fold and stripe precisely. Change ONLY the setting around her. Place her seated on a weathered cane cafe chair in a narrow Cycladic lane: chalky white walls, a hint of magenta bougainvillea to one side, pale stone paving. Warm late-afternoon Mediterranean sunlight from one side, soft directional light, a realistic contact shadow grounding her where she sits and where her feet meet the ground. Photorealistic, crisp natural focus throughout,  consistent warm light across the whole frame so she sits naturally in scene.
